name: node-red-contrib-flight-recorder
description: A flight recorder for Node-RED flows: rolling message recordings, dumped as structured incidents on demand, on error, or on watermark match. Inline and tap capture, cockpit-style control node, crash-surviving persistence.

scripts.test: node test-scripts/normalize-harness.js && node test-scripts/core-harness.js && node test-scripts/persistence-harness.js && node test-scripts/inline-harness.js && node test-scripts/control-harness.js && node test-scripts/tap-harness.js && node test-scripts/html-sanity.js
